note: Because a standardized global definition is used instead of national administrative ones, the figures may differ from those reported by countries.
title: Share of population living in cities with more than 1 million residents
subtitle: Percentage of the country's total population living in cities with 1 million or more people. [Cities](#dod:cities-degurba) are identified using satellite imagery and population data, applying the same density and size thresholds across all countries.
